---
id: customer-login
title: "Login"
description: "Authenticates a customer using a utility identity system token and returns a EnergyGrid authentication token."

hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Login"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/Customer/login"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Authenticates a customer using a utility identity system token and returns a EnergyGrid authentication token.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["token"],"properties":{"token":{"type":"string","description":"Token from utility identity system","example":"TOKEN_FROM_UTILITY_IDENTITY_SYSTEM"}},"title":"LoginRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Success. Returns the EnergyGrid authentication token object.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"token":{"type":"string","description":"EnergyGrid authentication token for subsequent API calls","example":"eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs..."},"scheme":{"type":"string","description":"Authentication scheme (always Bearer)","example":"Bearer"}},"title":"LoginResponse"}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad request. The token format is invalid."},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized. The token couldn't be validated."},"404":{"description":"Not found. The customer doesn't exist in the data store."}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
